component.name: OpenKara
component.summary: Turn your music library into a karaoke stage

description.p: OpenKara is an open-source desktop karaoke app that turns songs you already own into karaoke tracks on your computer.
It separates vocals on-device, shows synced lyrics or CD+G graphics, and stores the karaoke library in a portable local folder.

screenshot.caption: Library view with imported karaoke tracks and cover art
Player view with synced lyrics and queue controls
Setup flow for choosing a portable karaoke library folder

ul.li: Cross-platform desktop karaoke powered by on-device AI stem separation.
Portable karaoke library with synced lyrics and CD+G support.
Local playback, queueing, and full-screen karaoke presentation.
